HOW TO GET $DAWG

01

Get A Solana Wallet

Download Phantom or Solflare. Create a new wallet and keep your seed phrase safe. Welcome to web3, anon.

02

Buy Some SOL

Purchase SOL from any major exchange (Coinbase, Binance, Kraken) and send it to your Phantom wallet.

03

Swap For $DAWG

Head to pump.fun or Raydium. Paste the contract address and swap your SOL for $DAWG. Set slippage to 5-10%.

04

JOIN THE PACK 🐾

Welcome to the DAWG family! Follow us on X, join Telegram, and start spreading the DAWG gospel. Wagmi.
